heading: Your 8-week plan, week by week
intro: Every plan is personalized to your family, but here's the arc most families move through — building awareness first, then shaping habits that last.

weeks.title: Awareness & Co-Design
weeks.body: Start by understanding your child's relationship with screens — together. You'll map habits, triggers, and goals, and co-design a plan everyone feels part of.

weeks.title: Environment Shaping
weeks.body: Small changes to the spaces and routines around devices, so the healthier choice quietly becomes the easier, more natural one.

weeks.title: Introduce Replacement Routines
weeks.body: Screen time rarely just disappears — it gets replaced. This week brings in appealing alternatives that meet the same needs screens were filling.

weeks.title: Introduce Social Motivation
weeks.body: Change is easier with others. We add connection, shared activities, and social reinforcement so new habits feel rewarding, not restrictive.

weeks.title: Set Limits & Increase Autonomy
weeks.body: Now we set clear, agreed-upon boundaries — while handing your child more ownership of their choices, building self-regulation instead of control.

weeks.title: Problem-Solve & Sustain
weeks.body: Real life brings setbacks. This week is about troubleshooting what isn't working and reinforcing the routines that are starting to stick.

weeks.title: Further Reduce Screen Time
weeks.body: With a foundation in place, we gently lower screen time further — consolidating progress and stretching toward your family's goals.

weeks.title: Reflection & Maintenance
weeks.body: Look back on how far you've come and lock in what works, leaving with a durable plan to maintain healthy habits long after week eight.
